strategy: Fix lowest-scoring article (ai-safety-in-research 58.6), add missing sections and cross-links to key-papers and open-ended-discovery, fix benchmark link resolution bug, boost flagship linking scores, add 26 new papers across 4 topics
reasoning: ai-safety-in-research had sourcing=4 and missing category links — adding background, technical details, and 14 footnotes should yield ~20pt article gain. Fixing benchmark link resolution bug removes false broken-link penalties in core-concepts (+4-8pt per article). Adding cross-links to all 4 flagships should boost linking from 65 to 85+. New papers improve currency for autoresearch (11->57).
lesson: Fixing benchmark infrastructure bugs (link resolution) and adding cross-links to flagships yielded large gains with minimal content changes. Adding background/references sections to key-papers was highest-leverage structural fix. Safety article went from worst to above-average with sourcing improvements.
